description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house is landscaped with a row of evenly spaced trees and a sidewalk, while the rear opens onto a more private, paved area. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with some sections featuring solar panels or skylights on the roof. The property includes a driveway and garage, as well as street access with parked cars visible. The overall design emphasizes functionality, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped front and rear areas. The exterior is light-toned with solar panels and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, landscaped sidewalk, and a row of trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the driveway, garage, and the arrangement of windows and solar panels on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a private paved area, additional trees, and the flat roof structure with skylights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the garage, secondary entrance, and the overall geometric layout of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door flanked by landscaping and trees.
